member.name: M:ForName(System.String)
member.summary: Set up the client for the selected Network.

member.name: M:ForNetwork(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,AccountId},ExecutorService,System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a client given a set of nodes. It is the responsibility of the caller to ensure that all nodes in the map are part of the same Hedera Network. Failure to do so will result in undefined behavior. The client will load balance all requests to Hedera using a simple round-robin scheme to chose nodes to send transactions to. For one transaction, at most 1/3 of the nodes will be tried.
member.param: the map of node IDs to node addresses that make up the Network.

member.name: M:ForNetwork(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,AccountId},System.Action{Client})
member.summary:
Construct a client given a set of nodes.

It is the responsibility of the caller to ensure that all nodes in the map are part of the same Hedera Network. Failure to do so will result in undefined behavior.

The client will load balance all requests to Hedera using a simple round-robin scheme to chose nodes to send transactions to. For one transaction, at most 1/3 of the nodes will be tried.

the map of node IDs to node addresses that make up the Network. {@link Client}

member.name: M:ForMirrorNetwork(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Set up the client from selected mirror Network. Using default `0` values for realm and shard for retrieving addressBookFileId

member.name: M:ForMirrorNetwork(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String},System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Set up the client from selected mirror Network and given realm and shard

member.name: M:ForMainnet(System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Mainnet access.

member.name: M:ForMainnet(ExecutorService,System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Mainnet access.

member.name: M:ForTestnet(System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Testnet access.

member.name: M:ForTestnet(ExecutorService,System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Testnet access.

member.name: M:ForPreviewnet(System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Preview Testnet nodes.

member.name: M:ForPreviewnet(ExecutorService,System.Action{Client})
member.summary: Construct a Hedera client pre-configured for Preview Testnet nodes.

member.name: M:FromConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Configure a client based off the given JSON string.
member.param: The json string containing the client configuration

member.name: M:FromConfigFile(IOFileInfo)
member.summary: Configure a client based on a JSON file.
member.param: The file containing the client configuration

member.name: M:FromConfigFile(System.String)
member.summary: Configure a client based on a JSON file at the given path.
member.param: The string containing the file path
